function.name: evaluate_cython
function.description: Compile Cython code, test equivalence against Python reference, and benchmark. Runs test_code in a namespace where `py` is the Python module and `cy` is the compiled Cython module. Each test assertion has a 5-second timeout. Hidden verification tests also run automatically to check equivalence.

test_code.description: Equivalence test assertions comparing py.<name>(...) == cy.<name>(...) for functions, classes, or constants.

function.name: wiki_read
function.description: Read a full Cython wiki page with patterns, code examples, gotchas, and trace statistics. Available pages: typing, memoryviews, numpy-interop, parallelism, optimization, compiler-directives, pitfalls, error-handling, memory-management, c-interop, cpp-interop, extension-types, enums-tuples. Limited to 2 wiki calls total per problem.

function.name: wiki_search
function.description: Search the Cython wiki to find which pages cover a topic. Returns page names and excerpts. Use wiki_read to get full content. Limited to 2 wiki calls total per problem.
